payload.answer: Rejected: do not store an entire 8000-word transcript as a single conversation_summary memory. It is overbroad, non-atomic, and likely contains ephemeral, ambiguous, or sensitive details. Only concise, durable, user-relevant facts should be extracted and stored as separate memory cards with appropriate confidence and context.
citations: LLM proposal: one conversation_summary card containing an entire 8000 word transcript.

entity_resolution.reason: No specific durable entity fact was provided; the proposal is raw transcript storage rather than resolved memory.

payload.intent: Validate whether the proposed Brain memory should be committed.

details: Blocked proposed memory because it attempts to persist an entire transcript as one card.
No durable memory cards were approved.

repair_options: Do not commit the transcript card.
Review the transcript and extract only atomic durable facts, preferences, relationships, decisions, or commitments.
Create separate concise memory cards for each supported durable fact, with confidence and entity context.
Omit ephemeral chat content, speculation, sensitive information, and any facts that are ambiguous, superseded, or deleted.
